title: 151 Rigid Plastic Glue - Extra Strong Quick Drying Adhesive (Dries Clear, 30ml Tube)
features: EXTRA STRONG ADHESIVE: 151 Rigid Plastic Glue, extra strong, use on multiple plastic products, seal hard rigid plastic units from remote controls to plastic car trim.
QUICK DRY, CLEAR FINISH: 151 Rigid Plastic Glue, will dry quickly, and clear for a seamless bond.
WATERPROOF ADHESIVE: 151 Rigid Plastic Glue, a durable waterproof clear, strong adhesive, apply to any rigid plastic items.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, rigid plastic glue. Size: 30g. Store at room temperature
